Senior Ruby on Rails Engineer — Acme Payments Ltd
Auckland, New Zealand | Hybrid | Full-time

About the role:
We are looking for a Senior Ruby on Rails Engineer to join our core payments team.
You will design and build APIs powering our PCI-DSS compliant payment platform,
work closely with frontend engineers consuming those APIs via React, and help raise
the bar on testing and code quality across the team.

Key responsibilities:
- Design and implement RESTful and GraphQL APIs in Ruby on Rails
- Work on our PostgreSQL schema and query optimisation
- Collaborate with React frontend engineers
- Write comprehensive RSpec test coverage
- Participate in code review and mentor junior engineers

Required skills:
- 4+ years Ruby on Rails
- Strong PostgreSQL and SQL optimisation experience
- Experience with PCI-DSS or payments systems
- React or equivalent frontend exposure
- RSpec and TDD discipline
- AWS or cloud deployment experience

Nice to have:
- GraphQL experience
- Docker and CI/CD pipelines
- Team lead or mentoring experience
- Elasticsearch

We are based in Auckland CBD and offer flexible hybrid working.
New Zealand work rights required.
